assertions.title: Presets visually distinct from text input

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/ at desktop viewport (1280x900)
steps.expected: Slippage presets render as grouped toggle-style buttons distinct from custom text input
steps.observed: Presets rendered as grouped bordered buttons (3/10/50/100/300), while custom bps value rendered in a separate text input with its own field styling and trailing 'bps' label
Screenshot shows preset button group visually separated from rectangular text field

assertions.title: Clicking preset updates text input value

steps.expected: Input value updates to 100 and clicked preset becomes active
steps.observed: Input changed to '100'; '100' button received active class styling

evidence.network: No failing API calls during interaction

assertions.title: Active preset highlights when value matches

steps.expected: No preset is active when value doesn't match presets

evidence.network: No failing API calls during interaction

steps.expected: Slippage label, controls, and input remain usable without horizontal overflow
steps.observed: Slippage box remained within viewport bounds; label and interactive controls visible and tappable

steps.expected: No horizontal overflow and touch targets >=32px
steps.observed: documentElement.scrollWidth=375 and clientWidth=375 (no overflow); visible slippage buttons/input measured 44px tall

evidence.network: No failing API calls during responsive check

steps.action: Inspect computed styles for form/slippage labels and preset buttons
steps.observed: Computed font sizes measured at 12px for slippage label and preset buttons; form labels measured 12px in responsive view

steps.action: Cross-check in desktop and mobile viewports
Set viewport to 375x812 and capture full-page screenshot
steps.expected: No horizontal scrollbar; full layout fits width
steps.observed: Full-page screenshot shows layout fitting viewport width

assertions.title: Form elements visible and usable at 375px

steps.action: Review all primary form controls at 375x812 (chain, wallet, token inputs, direction toggle, amount, submit, slippage)
steps.expected: Controls are visible, non-overlapping, and tappable
steps.observed: Controls rendered within viewport with no overlap observed in screenshot
All visible controls were inside viewport and had height >=32px; major buttons and slippage controls were 44px tall

frictions.description: Playwright MCP created extra about:blank tabs during iterative interactions/screenshots.
frictions.resolution: Closed all extra tabs and continued in a single browser tab/session.

frictions.description: Known cosmetic favicon.ico 404 appears in console and can be mistaken for assertion failures.
frictions.resolution: Ignored favicon 404 per validation guidance; no other console errors observed.

summary: Tested 7 assigned assertions (VAL-SLIP-001..004, VAL-CSS-001..003): 7 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Screenshots and runtime evidence captured for desktop and 375px responsive checks.
